齊歡，原名齊襄，演員，畢業於中國戲曲學院表演系、解放軍藝術學院戲劇系。

2003 年憑藉電影處女作《美人草》提名第 24 屆中國電影金雞獎以及第 5 屆華語電影傳媒大獎最佳女配角，2005 年出演古裝劇《錦衣衞》。2006 年在電視劇《與青春有關的日子》中首次擔任女主角，她對劇中李白玲一角的演繹，得到了觀眾和業內人士的認可，人氣直線上升。

而後齊襄出演了《變種異煞》、《女人的選擇》，一個是温柔體貼的市長千金，一個是個性自我的都市女孩，這兩個角色都被齊襄詮釋得生動鮮活，深入人心。她用自己對人物的理解演繹著別樣人生，也得到了觀眾的認可。電視劇《最後的王爺》拍攝的齊襄，在這部劇中飾演了一個年齡跨度幾十歲的陪嫁丫環，與馮遠征、徐帆扮演的王爺、王妃經歷了一系列大時代的變遷。
data.name: 齊歡

data.biography:
Kevin Eldon is a British Actor, Comedian and Songwriter.  He featured in the major British TV comedies of the 1990s including Fist of Fun, Knowing Me, Knowing You with Alan Partridge, Big Train, Brass Eye and Jam. In 2013, Eldon appeared in his own BBC sketch series It's Kevin. He has also appeared in minor speaking roles in the HBO series Game of Thrones.  Eldon was born in Chatham, Kent. He has been a practising Buddhist since 1990. He has two children with his wife Holly, who he met in late 2005 on the set of Hyperdrive, where she was the art director.

Eldon occupies half a page in Oliver Gray's book called Volume – A Cautionary Tale of Rock and Roll Obsession; this includes coverage of punk-era Hampshire where, in late 1978, with two schoolmates from Bay House School, Gosport, Eldon started a band named Virginia Doesn't. Virginia Doesn't's career peaked with a session broadcast on Radio One's John Peel Show on 18 October 1979. In early 1980, Virginia Doesn't morphed into The Time, in which Eldon was again the front man. The Time recorded and performed from April 1980 until August 1982, during which time the band gigged extensively and played support slots with The Jam, Joe Jackson's Jumpin' Jive and Bad Manners. The Time had songs included on several self-released tape compilations, although they never secured a recording contract. In August 1982, The Time became Gerry Hackett & The Fringes, a spoof Sixties revival band. On 6 November 1983 Gerry Hackett & The Fringes appeared on BBC South's 'The Cellar Show' presented by John Sessions. Eldon started on the stand-up circuit in the early 1990s performing an act in-character as the political poet Paul Hamilton, but has also, on occasion, done stand-up as himself.

On the circuit, Eldon formed a friendship with stand-up comedian Stewart Lee, which would later lead to an invitation to work with him on the radio series Lee & Herring's Fist of Fun with Lee's comedy partner Richard Herring. Lee and Herring would usually refer to him as "the actor Kevin Eldon", in reference to his claim to being an actor rather than a comedian. Eldon's work sat well with that of Lee and Herring, and he continued to work with them on many of their projects, including The Lee & Herring Radio Show, Fist of Fun and This Morning with Richard Not Judy. He played recurring characters Simon Quinlank (the self-styled "King of Hobbies") and 'Rod Hull', a nonsensical version of Rod Hull with a prosthetic limb and an obsession with jelly, especially the 'green' variety. In 1994 and 1997, he appeared at the Edinburgh Fringe Festival as part the comedy troupe Cluub Zarathustra; other comedians in the troupe including Roger Mann, Johnny Vegas, Simon Munnery, and later Stewart Lee. They were given a Channel 4 pilot, which led to the television series Attention Scum! The book You Are Nothing by Robert Wringham praises the performers' talent. From March 2009, Eldon appeared in Stewart Lee's Comedy Vehicle in a number of the show's sketches most often with Paul Putner.
data.name: Kevin Eldon

data.biography:
Kapoor also known as Shahid Khattar, is an Indian actor who appears in Hindi films was born to actor Pankaj Kapoor and actor/classical dancer Neelima Azeem.

Kapoor made his film debut in 2003 with a leading role in the romantic comedy Ishq Vishk, a sleeper hit for which he won a Filmfare Award for Best Male Debut. Kapoor earned nominations for the Filmfare Award for Best Actor for portraying a troubled businessman in Imtiaz Ali's romantic comedy Jab We Met (2007) and twin brothers in Vishal Bhardwaj's caper thriller Kaminey (2009). 

Cited in the media as one of the most attractive Indian celebrities, Kapoor maintains his popularity despite a fluctuating career trajectory. Initially recognised for portraying romantic roles, Kapoor has since taken on parts in action films and thrillers. He is the recipient of several awards, including three Filmfare Awards. In addition to acting, Kapoor supports charities, hosts award ceremonies, and has featured as a talent judge on the dance reality show Jhalak Dikhhla Jaa Reloaded (2015). Following a romantic relationship with the actress Kareena Kapoor, he married Mira Rajput, a student from New Delhi, with whom he has a daughter.
data.name: Shahid Kapoor

data.biography:
Hannah Dakota Fanning (born February 23, 1994) is an American actress. Fanning is known for her roles in blockbuster films and independent features, both as a child actor and as an adult. Her accolades include nominations for a Primetime Emmy Award, a Golden Globe Award, and two Screen Actors Guild Awards.

Fanning received recognition at age 7 for starring in the drama film I Am Sam (2001), for which she was nominated for the SAG Award for Outstanding Performance by a Female Actor in a Supporting Role. She became the youngest nominee in SAG history. Fanning appeared in the films Uptown Girls (2003), Man on Fire (2004), and War of the Worlds (2005), the latter two cementing her stardom. She continued to appear in children's films such as Charlotte's Web (2006) and The Secret Life of Bees (2008). 

She transitioned to mature roles with The Twilight Saga (2009–2012), the independent film The Runaways (2010), and a co-starring role in Night Moves (2013). Fanning has appeared in films such as Ocean's 8 (2018), Once Upon a Time in Hollywood (2019), and The Equalizer 3 (2023). 

Since 2018, she has starred in television series The Alienist (2018), The First Lady (2022), and The Perfect Couple (2024). She has also had a starring role in The Watchers (2024) and received renewed critical recognition for the miniseries Ripley that same year, earning Golden Globe and Emmy nominations. Fanning also starred and produced The Sun Never Sets.

Ганна Дакота Фаннінґ — американська акторка.

Була першою дитиною в сімʼї професійної тенісистки Джой Еррінґтон і Стіва Фаннінґа, який тоді грав у молодшій бейсбольній лізі Св. Луї Кардиналса, а нині працює у сфері продажу електроніки. Подвійне імʼя дісталося їй через те, що батьки ніяк не могли дійти згоди в цьому питанні. Вони й досі кожен по-своєму її називають: мати — Ганною, а батько — Дакотою. Сама акторка звикла представлятися всім Дакотою, саме так її кличуть друзі та всі інші родичі. Фаннінґи є членами Південної баптистської конвенції. Дакота має німецьке й ірландске коріння. Молодша сестра Елль також є відомою акторкою.
data.name: Дакота Фаннінґ

data.biography: Hannah Dakota Fanning (née le 23 février 1994), mieux connue sous le nom de Dakota Fanning, est une actrice américaine. La performance révolutionnaire de Fanning était dans I Am Sam en 2001. En tant qu'actrice enfant, elle a joué dans des films très médiatisés comme Man on Fire, War of the Worlds et Charlotte's Web. Fanning a commencé la transition vers des rôles plus adultes avec Hounddog et The Secret Life of Bees. Parmi les films récents, mentionnons The Twilight Saga et The Runaways. Elle a remporté de nombreux prix et est la plus jeune candidate au Screen Actors Guild Award.

Η Χάνα Ντακότα Φάνινγκ (γεννημένη στις 23 Φεβρουαρίου 1994) είναι Αμερικανίδα ηθοποιός. Το ντεμπούτο της στον κινηματογράφο το έκανε σε ηλικία επτά χρονών στην δραματική ταινία Το όνομά μου είναι Σαμ (2001), για την ερμηνεία της στην ταινία έλαβε υποψηφιότητα για το βραβείο Screen Actors Guild σε ηλικία οκτώ ετών, κάνοντάς της τον νεότερο υποψήφιο. Η Φάνινγκ έπαιξε σημαντικό ρόλο στις ταινίες Κορίτσια από σπίτι (2003), Ο Γάτος (2003), Δια πυρός και σιδήρου (2004), Ο πόλεμος των Κόσμων (2005), Οικογενειακοί δεσμοί (2005), και Σάρλοτ, η αραχνούλα (2006). Η Φάνινγκ ακολούθησε πιο ώριμους ρόλους στις ταινίες, Ο σκύλος του κυνηγού (2007), Η μυστική ζωή των μελισσών (2008), Καρολίνα: Το Σπίτι στην Ομίχλη (2009), Οι αγωνιστές (2010), Το έπος του λυκόφωτος (2009–2012) και Κάποτε στο… Χόλυγουντ (2019). data.biography: Hannah Dakota Fanning urodziła się 24 lutego 1994r. Conyers, stan Georgia, Stany Zjednoczone, gdzie mieszkają jej rodzice i młodsza o 4 lata siostra Elle. Ojciec Dakoty Steve Fanning, w latach 90. grał w pomniejszych ligach baseballowych, a obecnie pracuje jako elektryk. Uczęszczała na lekcje baletu, gry na pianinie, a także języka hiszpańskiego. Pływa. Jeździ konno. Kolekcjonuje lalki. Przygotowując się do kolejnych ról podgląda członków rodziny. Aby rozpłakać się przed kamerą, wspomina śmierć swojej złotej rybki. Dakota już w wieku 4 lat organizowała występy teatralne dla rodziców, którzy postanowili dać jej szanse przed kamerą. Jak sie okazała odkryli u niej ogromny talent aktorski. Ma zaledwie 12 lat a wystepowała u boku takich gwiazd jak: Tom Cruise, Denzel Washington, Miranda Otto, Robert De Niro, Charlize Theron, czy Christopher Walken. Zagrała w wileu kasowych serialach. Przełomowy okazał sie dla niej rok 2001 gdzie wygrała casting i zagrała w filmie "Sam" Jessiego Nelsona obok Seana Penna, oprócz tego grała w takich filmach jak : "Człowiek w ogniu", "Kot", "Siła strachu" czy "Wojna światów" . Posiada wiele nagród filmowych i co najwazniejsze to to że wszystko wskazuje na to, iż Dakota Fanning nie jest gwiazdką jednego sezonu i bedzię szła do przodu szokując nas swoim talentem w coraz to nowszych filmach.

Hannah Dakota Fanning (* 23. Februar 1994) ist eine US-amerikanische Schauspielerin. Bekanntheit erlangte sie im Alter von sieben Jahren durch ihre Rolle als Lucy Dawson im Dramafilm I Am Sam (2001), für die sie im Alter von acht Jahren eine Nominierung für den Screen Actors Guild Award erhielt, was sie zur jüngsten Nominierten in der Geschichte der SAG machte. Fanning spielte wichtige Rollen als Kinderdarstellerin in den Filmen Uptown Girls (2003), Der Kater mit Hut (2003), Mann unter Feuer (2004), Krieg der Welten (2005), Dreamer (2005) und Wilbur und Charlotte (2006) sowie die gleichnamige Figur in Coraline (2009).

Es folgten reifere Rollen für Fanning, darunter Lewellen in Hounddog (2007), Lily in Die Bienenhüterin (2008), Cherie Currie in The Runaways (2010) und Jane in Die Twilight-Saga (2009–2012). In den 2010er Jahren trat sie weiterhin in unabhängigen Produktionen auf, beispielsweise in den Dramen Now Is Good (2012) und Night Moves (2013), der Comedy-Dramaserie Very Good Girls (2013) und dem biografischen Film Effie Gray (2014). 2018 trat sie in der Heist-Komödie Ocean's 8 auf und hatte eine Hauptrolle in der Historiendramaserie The Alienist. Seitdem hat sie das Manson-Mädchen Squeaky Fromme in dem Quentin-Tarantino-Film Once Upon a Time in Hollywood (2019) und First Daughter Susan Ford in der biografischen Showtime-Dramaserie The First Lady (2022) dargestellt.

data.biography:
Hannah Dakota Fanning (Conyers, Georgia, 23 de febrero de 1994) es una actriz y modelo estadounidense conocida por sus trabajos como actriz infantil en cine y televisión. Fanning se sitúa en el puesto número diez en la lista de VH1 de las 100 mejores estrellas infantiles de todos los tiempos.​

Considerada una niña prodigio debido a su gran habilidad y talento en la actuación, desde su niñez ha amasado una fortuna de millones de dólares. Durante el apogeo de su fama, fue consagrada como la quinta actriz infantil de mayor éxito desde Shirley Temple, Macaulay Culkin, Lindsay Lohan y Daniel Radcliffe por los American Film Institute Awards.​

Es la hermana mayor de Elle Fanning, también actriz. Aunque Fanning se ha centrado en la actuación, también hace trabajos relacionados con la moda. Su debut en el modelaje se produjo en 2009 cuando fue portada de revistas como Elle, Vanity Fair y Cosmopolitan, entre otras. También apareció en la semana de la moda de Nueva York en 2014 y en la ceremonia de apertura de la semana de la moda de Nueva York Primavera/Verano 2015.

Aparte de su carrera como actriz, Fanning también se ha dedicado a la filantropía. En 2009 fue galardonada con el premio Youth Ambassadors (Jóvenes embajadores) por Children's Rights. En 2014, Fanning trabajó junto a Mark Shriver, presidente de Save the Children. La actriz suministró un estimado de $25 millones de dólares para poner en marcha programas de educación para la primera infancia.
漢娜·狄高達·芬寧（英語：Hannah Dakota Fanning，1994 年 2 月 23 日—），美國女演員，2000 年以童星出道。狄高達的成名作是 2001 年的《不一樣的爸爸》、2005 年的《強戰世界》、《捉迷藏》和 2006 年的《莎樂的神奇網網》。範寧亦是美國演員工會獎最年輕的提名者之一。
data.name: 狄高達·芬寧

data.biography:
Hannah Dakota Fanning, 23 Şubat 1994 tarihinde Conyers, Georgia, ABD'de dünyaya gelmiştir. Profesyonel tenisçi bir anne ve beyzbolcu bir babanın kızı, aynı zamanda kendisi gibi ünlü bir oyuncu olan Elle Fanning'in ablasıdır. Oyunculuk yeteneği çok küçük yaşlarda fark edilen Fanning, kariyerine beş yaşında reklam filmlerinde rol alarak başladı. Televizyon dünyasına "ER", "CSI: Crime Scene Investigation" ve "Ally McBeal" gibi dizilerdeki konuk oyuncu rolleriyle adım attı.

Fanning'in kariyerindeki asıl büyük kırılma noktası, henüz yedi yaşındayken Sean Penn ile başrolü paylaştığı "Benim Adım Sam" (I Am Sam) (2001) filmi oldu. Zihinsel engelli bir babanın kızı olan Lucy karakterindeki performansı, ona Screen Actors Guild (SAG) Ödülleri'nde En İyi Yardımcı Kadın Oyuncu adaylığı getirdi ve bu ödüle aday gösterilen en genç oyuncu olarak tarihe geçti. Bu başarısının ardından Hollywood'un en çok aranan çocuk yıldızlarından biri haline geldi. Steven Spielberg'ün yapımcılığını üstlendiği "Taken" (2002) dizisindeki rolü ve Denzel Washington ile karşılıklı oynadığı "Gazap Ateşi" (Man on Fire) (2004) filmindeki olgun performansı, eleştirmenlerden tam not aldı.

2000'lerin ortasında, Tom Cruise ile başrolü paylaştığı Steven Spielberg filmi "Dünyalar Savaşı" (War of the Worlds) (2005) ve "Saklambaç" (Hide and Seek) (2005) gibi yüksek bütçeli yapımlarla şöhretini perçinledi. Ayrıca "Coraline" (2009) animasyon filminde seslendirme yaparak farklı alanlardaki yeteneğini sergiledi. Çocuk yıldız imajından yetişkin rollerine geçiş sürecini başarıyla yöneten Fanning, "Alacakaranlık" (The Twilight Saga) serisinde canlandırdığı Jane karakteri ve Kristen Stewart ile birlikte rol aldığı biyografik film "The Runaways" (2010) ile daha karanlık ve asi rollere yöneldi.

Bağımsız sinemada da aktif olan oyuncu, "Effie Gray" (2014) ve "Brimstone" (2016) gibi dönem filmlerinde yer aldı. Televizyon kariyerine verdiği arayı, 19. yüzyılda geçen psikolojik gerilim dizisi "The Alienist" (2018-2020) ile sonlandırdı ve buradaki Sara Howard rolüyle beğeni topladı. Quentin Tarantino'nun "Bir Zamanlar Hollywood'da" (Once Upon a Time in Hollywood) (2019) filminde Manson ailesi üyesi Squeaky Fromme'u canlandırdı.

Son yıllarda kariyerine iddialı projelerle devam eden Dakota Fanning, Patricia Highsmith'in romanından uyarlanan Netflix dizisi "Ripley"de (2024) Marge Sherwood karakterine hayat verdi. Aynı yıl, Ishana Night Shyamalan'ın yönettiği doğaüstü korku filmi "Gözcüler" (The Watchers) (2024) ile beyazperdede boy gösterdi. Gelecek projeleri arasında, kız kardeşi Elle Fanning ile ilk kez karşılıklı oynayacağı ve II. Dünya Savaşı'nı konu alan "The Nightingale" filmi bulunmaktadır.

Kellan Christopher Lutz (born March 15, 1985) is an American fashion model, and film and television actor, who is best known for playing Emmett Cullen in the Twilight series.

He made his film debut in Stick It (2006). He has since played Poseidon in the 2011 film Immortals, voiced the title character in the 2013 animated film Tarzan, played John Smilee in The Expendables 3 (2014), and Hercules in The Legend of Hercules (2014). He co-starred in the CBS thriller series FBI: Most Wanted (2020–2021).

凯南·鲁兹，美国模特、演员。他在2008年因出演《暮光之城暮色》中吸血鬼家族成员艾米特·卡伦而名气大增。凯兰·鲁兹将继续出现在《暮光之城暮色》(Twilight) 续集中。2009年，凯兰·鲁兹在《90210》出演George Evans。还与同为《暮光之城暮色》明星兼好友的阿什丽·格林尼合拍了《Warrior》。凯兰·鲁兹初到洛杉矶时，从事的是模特工作。2004年，他一边与Abercrombie&Fitch、李维斯(Levi's) 等大品牌合作，另一边出演独立电影和在电视剧中跑龙套。2005年，凯兰·鲁兹与丽莎库卓一起出演了情景喜剧《归来记》，并通过电影《录取通知》和《站稳了》登上大银幕。在和希拉里·达芙(Hilary Duff) 一起出演了几则广告和MV之后，凯南·鲁兹开始小有名气。后来，他又出演了热门美剧《犯罪现场调查：纽约篇》以及《犯罪现场调查：拉斯维加斯篇》。

　　凯兰·鲁兹是运动健将，喜欢很多运动，如极限滑板、举重、篮球、游泳、滑雪、跳舞等等。凯兰·鲁兹还是个恐怖片爱好者，他希望有一天能够出演恐怖片，并且于2011年出席美国青少年选择奖。

data.biography: Shriya Saran also known by the mononym Shriya, is an Indian film actress, model and presenter. She has worked in mulitple of the regional industries of Indian cinema, including Hindi, Tamil, and Telugu language films, as well as a few films in English, Malayalam and Kannada. Saran made her film debut in 2001 with Ishtam and had her first commercial success with the Telugu film Santhosham (2002). She would subsequently appear in several Telugu films, while making in-roads in the Hindi and Tamil film industries. In 2007, Saran starred in Sivaji: The Boss, the highest grossing Tamil film at that time. Her following projects include such Tamil films as Azhagiya Tamil Magan (2007) and Kanthaswamy (2009), as well as high-budget Hindi productions like Mission Istanbul (2008), her roles in which have established her as one of the leading actresses in the South Indian film industry. In 2008, Saran played the lead role in the American-Indian co-production The Other End of the Line. Apart from her work in films, Saran has been the brand ambassador for several stores across India, endorsing beauty and health products. Among other activities, she has taken part in a number of charity organisations, and has recently opened a spa employing visually challenged people.
data.name: Shriya Saran

data.biography: Shriya Saran 也被称为单名 Shriya，是印度电影女演员、模特和主持人。她曾在印度电影的多个区域行业工作，包括印地语、泰米尔语和泰卢固语电影，以及一些英语、马拉雅拉姆语和卡纳达语电影。Saran 于 2001 年与 Ishtam 一起首次亮相，并在泰卢固语电影 Santhosham （2002） 中取得了她的第一个商业成功。随后，她出演了几部泰卢固语电影，同时在印地语和泰米尔语电影业取得了进展。2007年，萨兰主演了当时票房最高的泰米尔语电影《西瓦吉：老板》。她接下来的项目包括泰米尔语电影，如《Azhagiya Tamil Magan》（2007年）和《Kanthaswamy》（2009年），以及高预算的印地语作品，如Mission Istanbul（2008年），她在其中的角色使她成为南印度电影业的主要女演员之一。2008年，萨兰在美国和印第安人合拍的《线的另一端》中担任主角。除了在电影中的工作外，Saran 还担任印度多家商店的品牌大使，为美容和健康产品代言。除其他活动外，她还参加了许多慈善组织，最近还开设了一家雇用视障人士的水疗中心。
data.name: 施芮娅·萨兰

data.biography: 施芮婭·薩蘭 也被稱為單名 Shriya，是印度電影女演員、模特和主持人。她曾在印度電影的多個區域行業工作，包括印地語、泰米爾語和泰盧固語電影，以及一些英語、馬拉雅拉姆語和卡納達語電影。Saran 於 2001 年與 Ishtam 一起首次亮相，並在泰盧固語電影 Santhosham （2002） 中取得了她的第一個商業成功。隨後，她出演了幾部泰盧固語電影，同時在印地語和泰米爾語電影業取得了進展。2007 年，薩蘭主演了當時票房最高的泰米爾語電影《西瓦吉：老闆》。她接下來的項目包括泰米爾語電影，如《Azhagiya Tamil Magan》（2007 年）和《Kanthaswamy》（2009 年），以及高預算的印地語作品，如 Mission Istanbul（2008 年），她在其中的角色使她成為南印度電影業的主要女演員之一。2008 年，薩蘭在美國和印第安人合拍的《線的另一端》中擔任主角。除了在電影中的工作外，Saran 還擔任印度多家商店的品牌大使，為美容和健康產品代言。除其他活動外，她還參加了許多慈善組織，最近還開設了一家僱傭視障人士的水療中心。
data.name: 施芮婭·薩蘭

Saxon Paige Sharbino (born June 11, 1999) is an American actress. She is known for portraying Amelia Robbins in the Fox series Touch and Kendra Bowen in the 2015 remake of Poltergeist.

Sharbino was born in Lewisville, Texas, the daughter of Angela and Ron Sharbino. She began acting at the age of nine. Saxon is the older sister of Brighton Sharbino and Sawyer Sharbino. She attended Bridlewood Elementary School for a few years, choosing to finish her elementary schooling at home while focusing on her acting. data.overview: Phim Tổng Tài Ở Trên Tôi Ở Dưới kể về Thời Tiểu Niệm – một họa sĩ truyện tranh không nổi tiếng bị “vua IT” nổi tiếng khắp thế giới Cung Âu bắt đi để ép cô giao ra đứa con của họ mà cô đã sinh ra vào 3 năm trước. Sau khi Thời Tiểu Niệm phủ nhận mình quen biết Cung Âu thì bị anh giam lỏng và dùng đủ mọi thủ đoạn để ép cô giao đứa bé. Dần dần, Thời Tiểu Niệm phát hiện Cung Âu mắc chứng rối loạn nhân cách hoang tưởng, hay ganh tỵ, chỉ tin vào bản thân và tính khí rất tệ. Còn trái tim Cung Âu thì lại loạn nhịp với Thời Tiểu Niệm dịu dàng và kiên cường, anh dùng những cách EQ thấp để theo đuổi cô. Hai người hoàn toàn không hợp nhau này lại cùng rơi vào lưới tình còn bí mật ba năm kia thì vẫn còn bỏ ngõ. Ngay lúc này, Mộ Thiên Sơ thanh mai trúc mã của Thời Tiểu Niệm đã hồi phục lại trí nhớ bị mất đi do cuộc phẫu thuật nên đã đến tìm cô.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Nigel Bennett (born 19 November 1949) is an English actor/director/writer who has been based in Canada since 1986. He is best known for playing the vampire patriarch Lucien LaCroix in the TV series Forever Knight, for which he won the Canadian Gemini Award for best supporting actor in a dramatic series.

data.biography:
Nigel Bennett (* 19. November 1949 in Wolverhampton, Staffordshire, England, Großbritannien) ist ein britisch-kanadischer Schauspieler im Theater und Film und ein Autor.

Nigel Bennett wurde an der University of Wales zum Schauspieler ausgebildet. Er trat und tritt auf britischen Theaterbühnen auf, etwa in West End in London, im Phoenix Theatre und Haymarket Theatre in Leicester und im Crucible Theatre in Sheffield. Nach fünfzehnjähriger Berufslaufbahn übersiedelte er 1986 aus privaten Gründen nach Kanada und wirkte in über hundert Film- und Fernsehprojekten sowie in Werbungen mit.

Bennett verkörperte Nebenrollen im Actionthriller Narrow Margin – 12 Stunden Angst (1990) mit Gene Hackman, im Filmdrama Legenden der Leidenschaft (1994) mit Brad Pitt und im Actionthriller Mord im Weißen Haus (1997) mit Wesley Snipes. Er spielte in der Mysteryserie PSI Factor (1996–1999) die Rolle des zwielichtigen O.S.I.R. Chefs Frank Elsinger.

Bennett gewann 1996 einen kanadischen Gemini Award als bester Nebendarsteller für die Dramaserie Nick Knight – Der Vampircop (Forever Knight) für die Folge Curiouser and Curiouser. In dieser Fernsehserie, in der er den uralten Vampir Lucien LaCroix darstellte, führte er erstmals Regie. 1993 bekam er eine Nominierung für diese Serie bei den Gemini Awards und 2002 für die dramatische Fernsehserie Lexx, jeweils als bester Nebendarsteller.

Als zweimaliger Gaststar in der dramatischen Fernsehserie Nikita mit Peta Wilson stellte er Colonel Egran Petrosian dar, der als russischer Geheimagent eine Machtintrige gegen seinen Vorgesetzten spinnt. Bei beiden Folgen führte Jon Cassar Regie. Er und Bennett hatten bereits in der Serie Nick Knight – Der Vampircop zusammengearbeitet.

Benjamin Biolay (born 20 January 1973) is a French singer, musician, songwriter, record producer and actor. He is the brother of singer Coralie Clément—whose first three albums he wrote and produced—and the ex-husband of Chiara Mastroianni, the daughter of Catherine Deneuve and Marcello Mastroianni.

His low-key vocal style is somewhat similar to French pop star Étienne Daho. With the singer Keren Ann, whose first two albums he co-wrote and produced, he contributed several songs to Chambre avec Vue, the successful comeback album of singer Henri Salvador, and has since worked as a writer, arranger or producer for other icons of French music, including Juliette Gréco, Julien Clerc, Françoise Hardy, Vanessa Paradis and Nolwenn Leroy.

He wrote or performed most of the songs on the 2004 soundtrack to Clara et Moi by Arnaud Viard, and released the album Home with his wife the same year. After two more rock oriented albums in 2005 and 2007 he was dropped by his record company and began working on his first independent release, La Superbe, released on Naïve records in 2009. This was followed by the soundtrack album Pourquoi tu pleures in 2011 and Vengeance in 2012.

Benjamin was married to actress and singer Chiara Mastroianni from 2002 to 2005; they have a daughter, Anna, born 22 April 2003.

Source: Article "Benjamin Biolay" from Wikipedia in English, licensed under CC-BY-SA 3.0.
data.name: Benjamin Biolay

data.biography:
Benjamin Biolay, né le 20 janvier 1973 à Villefranche-sur-Saône (Rhône), est un auteur-compositeur-interprète, producteur et acteur français.

Il est révélé au grand public en 2000, en composant avec Keren Ann l'album d'Henri Salvador, Chambre avec vue qui comprend notamment la chanson Jardin d'hiver. Benjamin Biolay est récompensé par 6 victoires de la musique: l'album révélation de l'année pour Rose Kennedy en 2002, l'interprète masculin de l'année et l'album de chansons pour La Superbe en 2010, Palermo Hollywood en 2017 et en 2021 l'interprète masculin et l'album de l'année pour Grand Prix.

Également acteur, il tourne avec Lætitia Masson, Anne Giafferi, Olivier Assayas, Tonie Marshall, Emmanuel Finkiel, Christophe Honoré, entre autres. Son rôle dans Stella de Sylvie Verheyde lui vaut une nomination au César du meilleur acteur dans un second rôle en 2009.

Benjamin Biolay naît le 20 janvier 1973 à Villefranche-sur-Saône dans un univers musical. Sa mère, Chantal, est issue d’une ancienne lignée de forgerons savoyards, la famille Opinel. Le grand-père de sa mère, Joseph Opinel (1867-1926) est le cousin homonyme du fondateur de la coutellerie Opinel, Joseph Opinel (1872-1960). Son père est agent de maîtrise à la MNEF, clarinettiste amateur et joue dans l'orchestre municipal. Son arrière-grand-père paternel possédait une distillerie à Villefranche-sur-Saône.

En dépit de cette ascendance, Benjamin Biolay grandit dans un milieu modeste, ses deux grands-pères ayant vécu pour l'un une brouille familiale, pour l'autre un échec commercial. Il fait ses études au collège et lycée Notre-Dame de Mongré à Villefranche-sur-Saône.

Il acquiert dans sa jeunesse la pratique du violon et du tuba notamment dans une fanfare puis intègre le conservatoire à rayonnement régional de Lyon où il apprend le trombone et en sort en 1990 avec deux premiers prix. Parallèlement au conservatoire, il s'initie, en autodidacte, à la guitare et à la pop et suit aussi les enseignements des classes musicales du lycée Saint-Exupéry à Lyon.

Au début des années 1990, il s'installe à Paris et sort quelques maquettes confidentielles. Il enregistre avec son groupe de l'époque, Matéo Gallion, un live (Live au Barbar, 1994) avant d'être remarqué par EMI chez qui il signe en 1996 et sort ses premiers singles, La Révolution (1997) puis Le jour viendra (1998), qui obtiennent peu d'échos. Il coécrit en 1998 avec Keren Ann le titre 1 + 1 du groupe Shelby, composé de Keren Ann, Karen Brunon et Xavier Druot.

Benjamin Biolay obtient son premier succès commercial et public en 2000 en tant qu'auteur grâce aux titres qu'il coécrit avec Keren Ann pour Henri Salvador sur l'album Chambre avec vue. L'album vendu à un million d'exemplaires, reçoit une victoire de la musique en 2001.

C'est en mai 2001 que sort son premier album: Rose Kennedy, une histoire fantasmée de la famille Kennedy, sur fond de pop jazzy aux arrangements parfois intimistes, parfois sombres. L'album remporte la Victoire de la musique de l'Album révélation de l'année en 2002 et est disque d'or. Un EP live enregistré au Casino de Paris sort en 2002 avec le single Los Angeles. ...

Source: Article "Benjamin Biolay" de Wikipédia en français, soumis à la licence CC-BY-SA 3.0.

吴昕（Orfila），1983年1月29日出生于辽宁省沈阳市，中国电视节目主持人、演员。

2003年10月，吴昕开始担任大连电视台《时尚十分》栏目的兼职主持人。2006年1月，吴昕获得“闪亮新主播”亚军，并签约湖南卫视，与何炅、李维嘉、谢娜、杜海涛一起主持娱乐节目《快乐大本营》。2009年，吴昕与杜海涛携手出新书《木土日斤》。2010年9月，吴昕所在主持团“快乐家族”发布专辑《快乐你懂的》。2013年1月，吴昕出演的电影《快乐到家》在中国上映。2015年7月，参与真人秀《极速前进第二季》，获得冠军 。2016年7月，参与明星跨界时尚真人秀《我的新衣》 。2017年1月，吴昕和李维嘉主持首档网综节目《爱in思谈》 。

data.biography:
John Heard (* 7. März 1946 in Washington, D.C.; † 21. Juli 2017 in Palo Alto, Kalifornien) war ein US-amerikanischer Schauspieler.

Heard machte sich zunächst in den 1970er-Jahren als Theaterschauspieler einen Namen. Heard erhielt 1977 einen Theatre World Award sowie den Obie Award für seine Rolle als Ivy Leaguer Micah Broadstreet in G.R. Point, einem von David Berry verfassten Theaterstück über den Vietnamkrieg. Einen zweiten Obie Award gewann Heard zwei Jahre später für seine Darstellung in Othello.

Als Schauspieler vor der Kamera debütierte Heard in dem Fernsehdrama Valley Forge aus dem Jahr 1975. In der Komödie Hals über Kopf (1979) übernahm er die Hauptrolle. Weitere Hauptrollen spielte er an der Seite von Jeff Bridges als paranoider, kriegsversehrter Vietnamveteran im Neo-Noir-Thriller Cutter’s Way – Keine Gnade (1981) sowie neben Nastassja Kinski und Malcolm McDowell in dem Thriller Katzenmenschen (1982). Für seine Rolle in der Miniserie Tender Is the Night (1985) war er 1987 für einen CableACE Award nominiert. Der vielseitige Darsteller verlegte sich im Laufe der 1980er-Jahre zusehends auf die Darstellung von Nebenrollen. In den Komödien Kevin – Allein zu Haus (1990) und Kevin – Allein in New York (1992) spielte er die Rolle von Peter McCallister, den Vater von Kevin McCallister, den Macaulay Culkin verkörperte.

In dem Thriller Die Killer-Brigade spielte Heard an der Seite von Gene Hackman, Joanna Cassidy und Tommy Lee Jones und in Die Akte (1993) war er neben Julia Roberts in der Rolle eines FBI-Agenten zu sehen. In der Komödie Desert Blue (1998) übernahm er die Rolle von Prof. Lance Davidson, dem Vater von Skye Davidson (Kate Hudson). Für seine Auftritte in der Fernsehserie Die Sopranos wurde er im Jahr 1999 für einen Emmy nominiert. Von 2005 bis 2006 trat er in zehn Episoden der Fernsehserie Prison Break auf. Sein Schaffen umfasst mehr als 170 Film- und Fernsehproduktionen.

小约翰·赫德（1946 年 3 月 7 日 - 2017 年 7 月 21 日）是一位美国演员。他出演了许多成功的电影，包括《心跳》（1980 年）、《刀客之路》（1981 年）、《猫人》（1982 年）、《海滩》（1988 年）和《受骗》（1991 年）。其他电影包括《丰饶之旅》（1985 年）、《大》（1988 年）、《鹈鹕简报》（1993 年）、《白小鸡》（2004 年），以及他在《小鬼当家》（1990 年）和《小鬼当家 2：迷失纽约》（1992 年）中饰演主角（凯文·麦卡利斯特）的父亲彼得。从1995年到1997年，他在电视连续剧《客户》中扮演罗伊·福尔特里格（Roy Foltrigg）一角。从2005年到2006年，赫德在《越狱》中扮演州长弗兰克·坦克雷迪（Frank Tancredi）的角色。1999 年，他因在《黑道家族》（1999-2004 年）中客串出演 Vin Makazian 而获得艾美奖提名。
data.name: 小约翰·赫德

data.biography: 尊·赫特（1946 年 3 月 7 日 - 2017 年 7 月 21 日）是一位美國演員。他出演了許多成功的電影，包括《心跳》（Heart Beat）（1980 年）、《Cutter's Way》（1981 年）、《豹妹》（Cat People）（1982 年）、《莫負當年情》（Beaches）（1988 年）和《咫尺危情》（Deceived）（1991 年）。其他電影包括《豐盛之旅》（The Trip to Bountiful）（1985 年）、《飛越未來》（Big）（1988 年）、《塘鵝暗殺令》（The Pelican Brief）（1993 年）、《白白淨戇探》（White Chicks）（2004 年），以及他在《寶貝智多星》（Home Alone）（1990 年）和《寶貝智多星續集：玩轉紐約》（Home Alone 2: Lost in New York）（1992 年）中飾演主角（麥哥裏·高堅）的父親彼得。從 1995 年到 1997 年，他在電視聯續劇《The Client》中扮演 Roy Foltrigg 一角。從 2005 年到 2006 年，赫特在《疑．媽》（Prison Break）中扮演州長 Frank Tancredi 的角色。1999 年，他因在《人在江湖》（The Sopranos）（1999 - 2004 年）中客串出演 Vin Makazian 而獲得艾美獎提名。
data.name: 尊·赫特

data.biography:
From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Samuel Southey Hinds (April 4, 1875 – October 13, 1948) was an American actor and former lawyer. He was often cast as kindly authoritarian figures and appeared in over 200 films until his death.

Hinds was born in Brooklyn, New York, the son of Joseph E. Hinds and Mary A. Beetham Hinds.

He was a graduate of Phillips Andover Academy and Harvard Law School and worked for over 32 years as a lawyer before becoming a professional actor. After he lost most of his money in the financial crisis of 1929, Hinds retired as a lawyer and joined the Pasadena Community Playhouse. He started acting in Broadway shows at age 54.

Hinds is perhaps best remembered for playing Peter Bailey, the father of James Stewart and founder of the Bailey Building and Loan, in It's a Wonderful Life (1946) and for his part as Paul Sycamore in You Can't Take It With You (1938), both films directed by Frank Capra. Hinds was also known for his roles in the Abbott & Costello films such as Buck Privates (1941), Ride 'Em Cowboy (1942) and Pardon My Sarong (1942). He also portrayed Lew Ayres' father in the Dr. Kildare film series during the early 1940s. Hinds mostly played supporting roles, often kind and dignified authority figures; often lawyers, doctors, mayors, judges or the father of the main figure.

Hinds' first film was If I Had a Million (1932); his second film was The Road Is Open Again (1933) where he portrayed President Woodrow Wilson. His earlier career was reflected in the role of Judge Thatcher, tortured by the mad Dr. Richard Vollin (Bela Lugosi) in The Raven (1935).

Hinds acted in a total of 214 films. His last film was The Bribe, released in 1949, after his death.

Hinds died of pneumonia in Pasadena, California, on October 13, 1948 at age 73. He was married to Dorothy Cruickshack, they had two children.
data.name: Samuel S. Hinds

Josh Lee Holloway (born July 20, 1969) is an American actor best known for his roles as James "Sawyer" Ford on the television show Lost and as Will Bowman on the science fiction drama Colony. Most recently he had a recurring role in season 3 of the western series Yellowstone.

Holloway was born in San Jose, California, the second of four boys of a nurse mother and a surveyor father. His family moved to the Blue Ridge Mountains of Georgia when he was two. He was raised in Free Home, Georgia. Holloway is related to Baptist preacher Dr. Dale Holloway, and author and World War II prisoner of war Carl Holloway. He is also a descendant of Robert E. Lee. Holloway attended Cherokee High School in Canton, Georgia, graduating in 1987. He developed an interest in movies at a very young age. He studied at the University of Georgia but left after one quarter due to financial constraints. Holloway moved to Los Angeles, where he began a successful career as a runway and print model, including for brands Dolce & Gabbana, Calvin Klein and Donna Karan. In 1993, Holloway appeared in the Aerosmith video for the song "Cryin'" as a thief who tries to steal Alicia Silverstone's purse from a diner, only to be caught and beaten up by her.  Holloway eventually started acting. His first role was as "Good Looking Guy" in an episode of Angel in 1999, followed by a role in the comedy Doctor Benny and in the movies Mi Amigo, Moving August, and Cold Heart. Following these roles, he gained recognition for his lead role in the Sci-Fi Channel movie Sabretooth with David Keith and John Rhys-Davies. He also made appearances in Good Girls Don't episode "Addicted To Love"; NCIS episode "My Other Left Foot"; The Lyon's Den episode "Separation Anxiety"; Walker, Texas Ranger episode "Medieval Crimes"; and CSI: Crime Scene Investigation episode "Assume Nothing". His big break came when he was cast as James "Sawyer" Ford in the hit television series Lost. The show propelled Holloway to celebrity status, but left him with little time to leverage his fame with other roles.
data.name: Josh Holloway

乔什·李·霍洛威（Josh Lee Holloway，1969 年 7 月 20 日出生）是一位美国演员，因在电视节目《迷失》中饰演詹姆斯·福特和在科幻剧《殖民地》中饰演威尔·鲍曼而闻名。最近，他在西部连续剧《黄石公园》第 3 季中反复扮演角色。

霍洛威出生于加利福尼亚州圣何塞，是四个男孩中的第二个，母亲是护士，父亲是测量员。他的家人在他两岁时搬到了佐治亚州的蓝岭山脉。他在佐治亚州的自由之家长大。霍洛威与浸信会传教士戴尔·霍洛威博士以及作家和二战战俘卡尔·霍洛威有亲戚关系。他也是罗伯特·李（Robert E. Lee）的后裔。霍洛威就读于佐治亚州坎顿的切诺基高中，于 1987 年毕业。他在很小的时候就对电影产生了兴趣。他就读于佐治亚大学，但由于经济拮据，一个季度后就离开了。霍洛威搬到了洛杉矶，在那里他开始了成功的时装秀和平面模特生涯，包括为Dolce&Gabbana，Calvin Klein和Donna Karan等品牌工作。1993 年，霍洛威出现在 Aerosmith 的歌曲“Cryin'”视频中，饰演一名试图从餐馆偷走艾丽西亚·西尔弗斯通钱包的小偷，结果被她抓住并殴打。霍洛威最终开始演戏。他的第一个角色是 1999 年在《天使》的一集中饰演“好看的家伙”，随后在喜剧《本尼医生》和电影《Mi Amigo》、《Moving August》和《Cold Heart》中扮演角色。在这些角色之后，他因与大卫·基思和约翰·里斯-戴维斯在科幻频道电影《剑齿虎》中的主角而获得认可。他还出演了《好女孩不要》一集“Addicted To Love”;海军罪案调查处剧集“我的另一只左脚”;里昂的书房插曲“分离焦虑”;沃克，德克萨斯游骑兵剧集“中世纪犯罪”;和《犯罪现场调查：犯罪现场调查》剧集“Assume Nothing”。当他在热门电视连续剧《迷失》中饰演詹姆斯“索耶”福特时，他的重大突破来了。这部剧将霍洛威推向了名人地位，但他几乎没有时间利用自己的名气来扮演其他角色。
data.name: 乔什·霍洛威

喬什·李·霍洛威（Josh Lee Holloway，1969 年 7 月 20 日出生）是一位美國演員，因在電視節目《迷失》中飾演詹姆斯·福特和在科幻劇《殖民地》中飾演威爾·鮑曼而聞名。最近，他在西部聯續劇《黃石公園》第 3 季中反覆扮演角色。

霍洛威出生於加利福尼亞州聖何塞，是四個男孩中的第二個，母親是護士，父親是測量員。他的家人在他兩歲時搬到了佐治亞州的藍嶺山脈。他在佐治亞州的自由之家長大。霍洛威與浸信會傳教士戴爾·霍洛威博士以及作家和二戰戰俘卡爾·霍洛威有親戚關係。他也是羅伯特·李（Robert E.Lee）的後裔。霍洛威就讀於佐治亞州坎頓的切諾基高中，於 1987 年畢業。他在很小的時候就對電影產生了興趣。他就讀於佐治亞大學，但由於經濟拮據，一個季度後就離開了。霍洛威搬到了洛杉磯，在那裏他開始了成功的時裝秀和平面模特生涯，包括為 Dolce&Gabbana，Calvin Klein 和 Donna Karan 等品牌工作。1993 年，霍洛威出現在 Aerosmith 的歌曲“Cryin'”視頻中，飾演一名試圖從餐館偷走艾麗西亞·西爾弗斯通錢包的小偷，結果被她抓住並毆打。霍洛威最終開始演戲。他的第一個角色是 1999 年在《天使》的一集中飾演“好看的傢夥”，隨後在喜劇《本尼醫生》和電影《Mi Amigo》、《Moving August》和《Cold Heart》中扮演角色。在這些角色之後，他因與大衞·基思和約翰·里斯 - 戴維斯在科幻頻道電影《劍齒虎》中的主角而獲得認可。他還出演了《好女孩不要》一集“Addicted To Love”; 海軍罪案調查處劇集“我的另一隻左腳”; 里昂的書房插曲“分離焦慮”; 沃克，德克薩斯遊騎兵劇集“中世紀犯罪”; 和《犯罪現場調查：犯罪現場調查》劇集“Assume Nothing”。當他在熱門電視聯續劇《迷失》中飾演詹姆斯“索耶”福特時，他的重大突破來了。這部劇將霍洛威推向了名人地位，但他幾乎沒有時間利用自己的名氣來扮演其他角色。
data.name: 喬什·霍洛威

data.biography:
Joshua Lee "Josh" Holloway, 20 Temmuz 1969 tarihinde San Jose, Kaliforniya'da dünyaya gelmiştir. Henüz iki yaşındayken ailesiyle birlikte Georgia'nın Blue Ridge Dağları bölgesine taşındı ve çocukluğunu burada geçirdi. Genç yaşta sinemaya ilgi duymaya başlasa da, Georgia Üniversitesi'ndeki eğitimini bir yıl sonra bırakarak başarılı bir modellik kariyerine adım attı. Bu kariyer ona Avrupa ve Kuzey Amerika'da çalışma fırsatı sundu ve Dolce & Gabbana, Calvin Klein gibi büyük markalar için podyuma çıktı.

Oyunculuk tutkusuyla Los Angeles'a taşınan Holloway, kariyerine 1999 yılında "Angel" dizisindeki küçük bir rolle başladı. Ardından "Cold Heart" (2001), "Sabretooth" (2002) gibi filmlerde ve "CSI: Crime Scene Investigation" gibi dizilerde çeşitli roller alarak deneyim kazandı. Bu dönemdeki performansları, ona sektörde yavaş yavaş tanınırlık getirdi.

Ancak Josh Holloway'i uluslararası bir yıldız yapan ve adını tüm dünyaya duyuran rol, şüphesiz ABC'nin fenomen dizisi "Lost" (2004-2010) ile geldi. Dizide canlandırdığı alaycı, anti-kahraman dolandırıcı James "Sawyer" Ford karakteri, izleyicinin en sevdiği karakterlerden biri haline geldi. Sawyer'ın zamanla ortaya çıkan duygusal derinliği ve karmaşık geçmişi, Holloway'in oyunculuk yeteneğini tam anlamıyla sergilemesini sağladı. Bu ikonik rol, onu dünya çapında bir seks sembolü ve aranan bir oyuncu yaptı. Karizmatik performansı, People dergisi tarafından "Dünyanın En Güzel 50 İnsanından Biri" seçilmesi gibi popüler kültürde de büyük yankı uyandırdı.

"Lost"un sona ermesinin ardından Holloway, kariyerini sinema ve televizyonda önemli projelerle devam ettirdi. "Görevimiz Tehlike 4: Hayalet Protokol" (2011) filminde kısa ama etkili bir rolle yer aldı. Televizyona ise başrolünü üstlendiği "Intelligence" (2014) dizisiyle döndü. Ardından, üç sezon boyunca uzaylı istilası altındaki bir dünyada hayatta kalma mücadelesi veren eski bir FBI ajanını canlandırdığı bilimkurgu dizisi "Colony" (2016-2018) ile başroldeki başarısını pekiştirdi.

Son yıllarda, büyük beğeni toplayan modern western dizisi "Yellowstone"da canlandırdığı Roarke Morris karakteriyle yeniden dikkatleri üzerine çekti. Ayrıca, kendisini "Lost"un yaratıcısı J.J. Abrams ile yeniden bir araya getiren "Duster" adlı yeni bir dizi projesiyle de kariyerine devam etmektedir. Holloway, "Sawyer" karakteriyle kazandığı haklı şöhreti, farklı türlerdeki projelerle başarılı bir şekilde sürdüren bir aktör olarak öne çıkmaktadır.

Emma Sjöberg ou Emma Wiklund est un mannequin et actrice suédoise née le 13 septembre 1968 à Stockholm (Suède).

Emma Sjöberg fait des études supérieures de marketing international. Elle commence sa carrière artistique en défilant sur les podiums pour l'agence Elite puis en participe à des défilés comme ceux de Karl Lagerfeld, Thierry Mugler, Christian Lacroix ou Lanvin3.

Il s'ensuit quelques participations dans différents clips : Tandem de Vanessa Paradis ou Too Funky (en) de George Michael4.

En 1995, elle entame une carrière d'actrice avec le film Inferno, mais elle est réellement révélée au grand public dans la saga Taxi, grâce au rôle de Petra5.

Concernant sa vie privée, elle fut en couple avec Ulf Gunnar Ekberg (en), claviériste du groupe Ace of Base, de 1994 à 2000 puis elle se marie en 2003 à Hans Wiklund (en) et ont deux enfants : Tyra6 (née le 11 décembre 2001) et Elis (né le 20 octobre 2003).

Forte de son expérience de mannequinat et d'actrice, elle travaille en collaboration avec l'entreprise de cosmétique Lindex (en) depuis 2007, puis crée sa propre ligne de produit « Emma S. Skincare »

Philip Van Zandt wurde 1904 in Amsterdam geboren, der genaue Zeitpunkt seiner Übersiedlung nach Amerika ist unbekannt. Er selbst gab an, bereits in seiner frühen Jugend übergesiedelt zu sein und mit 15 Jahren Hollywood besucht zu haben. Andere Quellen besagen, dass er erst Ende der 1920er-Jahre in die USA gekommen sei, als er bereits in seinem Heimatland erste Schauspielerfahrungen gesammelt hatte. Im Juni 1931 machte er in der Komödie A Regular Guy sein Broadwaydebüt, hier trat er bis 1938 in zehn weiteren Produktionen auf. Anschließend wandte er sich dem Filmgeschäft zu.

Zwischen 1939 und 1958 trat Van Zandt in fast 250 Film- und Fernsehproduktionen in Hollywood auf, was ihn zu einem vielbeschäftigten Schauspieler machte, wenngleich seine Rollen meistens nur kleiner Natur waren. Wie er besetzt wurde, hing oft davon ab, ob er seinen dünnen Schnurrbart trug: Ohne diesen wurde er als Durchschnittskerl besetzt, mit diesem als Schurke. In vielen Kurzfilmen war er als Gegenspieler der Three Stooges zu sehen, oft als Verbrecher, Miesepeter oder verrückter Wissenschaftler. In den Komödien Air Raid Wardens (1943) und The Big Noise (1944) mimte er auch Gegensacher von Laurel und Hardy. Im Zweiten Weltkrieg spielte er wegen seiner europäischen Herkunft in Propagandafilmen oft feindliche Spione oder Offiziere, etwa in Tarzan und die Nazis. In die Filmgeschichte schrieb er sich 1941 auch durch eine kleine, aber wichtige Rolle in Citizen Kane: Van Zandt spielt zu Filmanfang den Chefredakteur der Nachrichtensendung, der den jungen Reporter auf die Suche nach der Bedeutung des Wortes „Rosebud“ losschickt.

Eine von ihm gegründete Schauspielschule blieb erfolglos, zugleich verspielte Van Zandt durch Glücksspielsucht in den 1950er-Jahren sein gesamtes Vermögen.

Molly Sims (born May 25, 1973) is an American fashion model and actress. She was featured in campaigns for Jimmy Choo, Escada, Giorgio Armani, Michael Kors, and Chanel. She frequently modelled for the Sports Illustrated swimsuit issue in the early 2000s. She walked the runway for the annual Victoria's Secret Fashion Show in 2001.

As an actress, she portrayed Delinda Deline in NBC's comedy-drama series Las Vegas (2003–2008) and the "right Missy" in The Wrong Missy (2020).

Sergey Vladimirovich Shnurov ( born 13 April 1973 ) is a Russian musician and songwriter, best known as Shnur, of the ska-punk band Leningrad which he formed in 1997 and was the frontman of till the end of 2008.  In December 2008 the group disbanded, Shnur with some of its members forming Rubl.  

Three of Shnur's songs featured on the Everything Is Illuminated soundtrack, including hugely popular Дикий Мужчина (Dikiy Muzhchina, "Wild Man").  Shnurov also composed music for many other movies, including the Russian cult film Boomer and its sequel. He has a daughter named Siham. She lives in France and is a talented drummer and songwriter.

data.biography: После школы учился в Ленинградском инженерно-строительном институте, реставрационном ПТУ (реставратор произведений из дерева 4-го разряда), религиозно-философском институте при духовной академии.
